title: Connect Client Forge (& Legacy)
description: A Connect client port to Forge & Early MC versions
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/21370176a06685c2646cd72a31e1791ee9d8d572.png)

Connect Client Forge & Legacy is the client for players who wants to use my client in earlier versions of minecraft. This pack introduces numerous performance optimizations, and visual upgrades, making every aspect of the game feel smoother, more immersive, and more enjoyable.

Key Enhancements:

Optimized Performance – Enjoy significantly improved FPS, refined chunk loading, and better overall game stability, allowing for seamless exploration.

Multiplayer-Friendly – Designed to be lightweight and compatible with all servers, and the inclusion of the essentials mod making the experience of playing with a friend easier.
